## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Scrunch AI prompt strategy and best practices for optimizing AI search presence for Galileo (client).](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LLM searches are significantly longer (avg. 23 words) than Google searches (avg. 4 words), focusing on solutions and intent](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [AI search optimization still relies heavily on SEO fundamentals; content must rank in top 10-15 results to be considered](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Prompts should be long-tail, conversational, and focused on specific dimensions or use cases rather than broad keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Lists, reviews, and authoritative citations are crucial for establishing credibility in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Topics

### AI Search Query Processing

  - [ChatGPT condenses long-tail prompts into core keywords for Bing search](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Results are then evaluated for credibility using E-E-A-T model](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Most authoritative sources are synthesized for LLM response](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Recency bias exists; refreshing content is crucial for maintaining relevance](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Prompt Strategy Optimization

  - [Focus on intent and specific dimensions (e.g., product features, customer service)](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Consider both company perspective and potential customer questions](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Avoid duplicate prompts with similar core keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Aim for solution-focused, longer queries (avg. 23 words for LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Iterative process: test prompts and refine based on valuable insights](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Best Practices for AI Optimization

  - [Prioritize getting featured in influential lists and review platforms (e.g., G2 for SaaS)](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Implement schema markup for better AI interpretation of website content](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Include unique facts, citations, quotes, and statistics to demonstrate authority](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Consider creating AI-optimized versions of web pages (separate from human-optimized versions)](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Maintain strong SEO practices as they remain crucial for AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### Scrunch AI Tool Usage

  - [Use the Insights tab to identify gaps in competitive coverage](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Analyze condensed search queries to understand how prompts are processed](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Leverage competitor comparisons but focus on specific attributes or use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to revise and extend prompts, focusing on long-tail, solution-oriented queries](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Mara to send updated prompt list to Andrew by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Andrew to upload new prompts to Scrunch AI system and initiate tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Consider scheduling follow-up strategy sessions for deeper dives into client-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Explore potential use of Scrunch's upcoming Agentic Experience Platform for AI-optimized content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/xdyfLqd8yiJbKy6ZQwvk2QkeRChbMFCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
